name: Crawfish Zombie Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a food processor, combine garlic, butter, cheese, mayonnaise, lemon juice, Tabasco, and Worcestershire sauce until smooth.
3. Add chopped green onions and fresh thyme leaves. Pulse until blended.
4. Fold in the chopped crawfish tails.
5. Chill mixture for 30 minutes.
6. Spread the mixture on open-faced bread.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
